issue_title: 市區道路安全與停車動線專案報告
issue_summary: 依 reviewed sample 摘要：本段為模擬公開會議紀錄內容，討論市區道路安全、停車動線與行人環境改善。 交通處說明將盤點學校周邊路口，並提出改善時程供議會後續追蹤。
source_context: Fixture-only public sample derived from https://www.cycc.gov.tw/public/minutes/sample.html; not a formal CYCC dataset.
notes: derived from reviewed sample, not official public conclusion; requires manual policy review.

issue_title: 人行空間與排水改善專案報告
issue_summary: 依 reviewed sample 摘要：本段為模擬公開會議紀錄文字，討論人行空間、騎樓整平與排水改善。 建設處說明將依公開會議紀錄所列議題，整理改善順序並回報後續處理進度。
source_context: Fixture-only public sample derived from https://www.cycc.gov.tw/public/minutes/sample.pdf; not a formal CYCC dataset.
notes: derived from reviewed sample, not official public conclusion; requires manual policy review.
